title: Alien Abduction in Progress
description: Caller frantically claims a UFO is beaming up their neighbor, demanding immediate intervention.
initial_variations: Oh my god, there's a spaceship outside! It's taking my neighbor {victim_name}! Send everything!
Help! Aliens are abducting people! I'm {caller_name}, I can see the tractor beam!
This is not a joke! A UFO is hovering over {victim_name}'s house. They're being lifted into the sky!
They're here! The aliens are real! My friend {victim_name} is floating away! Do something!

specific_details: The ship is silver with blinking lights
There are little green men waving
The tractor beam is sparkling green
My dog is barking at the light

initial: We're at {address_location}. Right outside my window!
It's happening at {address_location}. Hurry!
elaborating_sight: Still {address_location}. The beam is getting brighter!
demanding_action: The same place! {address_location}. Why aren't you sending anyone?
prank_revealed: Oh, um... we're at {address_location}. But it was just a joke, okay?

initial: I hear {ambient_audio}. {specific_details}. It's totally real!
demanding_action: How many details do you need? {specific_details} and the sound {ambient_audio}!
prank_revealed: Well, the 'UFO' was just a drone with LEDs... so, uh, no real details.

initial: I'm terrified! I've never seen anything like this!
elaborating_sight: I'm hiding behind the couch, but I can still see it!
demanding_action: I'm furious! Why isn't the army here yet?
prank_revealed: I'm fine, it was just a prank. You're not mad, right?

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive to find a neighborhood gathering laughing at a prank call, wasting precious time.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters roll up to a scene of giggling teenagers with a drone. They are not amused.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Ambulance crew finds no medical emergency, only a group of pranksters filming the response.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control officer is bewildered by the 'alien' hoax and files a report for misuse of emergency services.

DISMISS.message: Dispatcher recognizes the absurdity and logs the call as a prank, saving resources for real emergencies.

title: Zombie Outbreak at the Mall
description: Caller claims to be trapped in a shopping mall overrun with the undead, begging for extraction.
initial_variations: They're everywhere! Zombies! At the mall! I'm hiding in the food court, send the military!
My name is {caller_name} and I'm under attack by flesh-eating zombies! They got {victim_name}!
This is an emergency! The dead are walking in the mall! I can hear {ambient_audio}!
Help! I'm barricaded in a store with {victim_name} and the zombies are trying to break in!

specific_details: They move slowly but there are hundreds
One is wearing a Santa suit
I have a baseball bat
The sliding doors are jammed

initial: We're at {address_location}. The main entrance is swarmed!
At {address_location}. I'm on the second floor by the electronics store.
describing_attack: Still {address_location}. They're climbing over the barricades!
negotiating_rescue: The same mall: {address_location}. Can you send a helicopter?
hoax_confessed: Okay, okay, we're at {address_location}. It's just a Halloween prank, bro.

initial: I hear {ambient_audio}. {specific_details}. It's a real apocalypse!
describing_attack: Now {ambient_audio} is louder. Also {specific_details}. Please hurry!
negotiating_rescue: The details? {specific_details} and the moans {ambient_audio}. What else do you need?
hoax_confessed: The 'zombies' are just my friends in makeup. So, no actual danger.

initial: I'm shaking! This can't be happening!
describing_attack: I'm holding the door with a mop handle. {victim_name} is crying.
negotiating_rescue: I'm losing hope! Why won't you send anyone?
hoax_confessed: We're all fine. It was just for a YouTube video. Sorry.

SEND_POLICE.message: SWAT team breaches the mall only to find teenagers with zombie makeup laughing, wasting significant resources and risking public safety.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire trucks respond to a 'mass casualty incident', but it's all a hoax, tying up emergency vehicles for an hour.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Three ambulances are dispatched to a fake outbreak, endangering real patients elsewhere.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control is utterly confused and files a complaint against the callers for misuse of 911.

DISMISS.message: The dispatcher identifies the call as a prank based on the absurd scenario and avoids any dispatch, noting it for possible investigation.

title: My Toaster is Recording Conversations
description: Caller reports that their kitchen appliance has become self-aware and is spying for a foreign government.
initial_variations: Hello? My toaster is bugged! It's repeating everything I say in a Russian accent. I'm not kidding!
This is {caller_name}. My kitchen is under surveillance by my own toaster. I need police!
Emergency! An appliance is recording me! It's a national security breach, you have to help!
I swear, my toaster just said my name! It's got a camera, I'm sure of it. I'm scared!

specific_details: It burned the toast into a portrait of Putin
The toaster is a 2005 model, but it has a blinking blue light now
I bought it secondhand from a suspicious man
It started speaking in codes during breakfast

initial: I'm at {address_location}. The toaster is in the kitchen.
My house, {address_location}. Come quick, it's giving me the evil eye.
getting_agitated: Why does it matter? It's {address_location}! The toaster knows you're asking!
prank_admitted: Alright, you got me. We're at {address_location}, but it's just a prank. The toaster isn't really spying.

initial: I hear {ambient_audio}. Plus, {specific_details}. It's clearly a spy device.
providing_proof: Now it's going {ambient_audio} again. Also, {specific_details}. Do you need more?
getting_agitated: The details? {specific_details} and the noises {ambient_audio}. Isn't that proof enough?
prank_admitted: Well, the 'spying' was a voice recorder stuck under the toaster. So, no real threat.

initial: I'm paranoid! I can't even make toast without feeling watched.
providing_proof: I'm trying to unplug it, but it keeps popping up toast with threats!
getting_agitated: I'm furious! You're not taking this seriously! The toaster is mocking me!
prank_admitted: We're good, just having a laugh. Sorry for the trouble.

SEND_POLICE.message: Officers arrive to a prank scene and issue citations for misuse of 911, wasting patrol time on a toaster joke.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters are disdainful to find no fire, only a silly hoax, and a toaster with a drawn face.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics appear, confused, and the caller admits it's a prank, wasting medical resources.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control officer wonders why they were sent to a 'spy toaster' call and leaves annoyed.

DISMISS.message: Dispatcher detects the absurdity and dismisses the call as a prank, possibly flagging the number for future reference.

title: Time Traveler Stuck in My Living Room
description: Caller claims a man from the year 3000 has materialized in their home and is demanding to charge his portable time device.
initial_variations: Help! A guy in a silver suit just appeared in my living room! He says he's from the future and needs a USB-C cable!
My name is {caller_name}. There's a time traveler here! He's named {victim_name} and he's rearranging my furniture!
I'm not crazy! A portal opened and a man stepped out! He's looking for a 'quantum charger'. Please send help!
Emergency! A future person is stuck here! {victim_name} claims his time machine broke and I'm not sure what to do!

ambient_audio: a low hum from a device
specific_details: He has a glowing wristband and talks in binary
He keeps asking about 'Skynet' and 'President Musk'
He says I'm his ancestor and owes him a battery
He materialized right on my coffee table, breaking a lamp

initial: We're at {address_location}. The portal closed behind him.
My home, {address_location}. He's pacing around, checking his 'temporal watch'.
explaining_predicament: Still {address_location}. He's getting agitated because his device is at 5%.
insisting_on_urgency: The same place! {address_location}. If he doesn't charge it, he says the timeline will collapse!
prank_exposed: Okay, we're just at {address_location}. It was a skit for social media. He's my buddy in a costume.

initial: I hear {ambient_audio}. Also {specific_details}. It's really him from the future!
explaining_predicament: Now {ambient_audio} is louder. And get this: {specific_details}. He needs that charger ASAP.
insisting_on_urgency: More details? Fine: {specific_details} and the sounds {ambient_audio}. Are you coming?
prank_exposed: The 'time travel' was just dry ice and a speaker. So, no actual time crisis.

initial: I'm baffled and a little scared. This shouldn't be possible!
explaining_predicament: I'm trying to find a charger that fits his weird port. He's getting pushy.
insisting_on_urgency: I'm desperate! He says if he doesn't go back, I'll cease to exist!
prank_exposed: We're both fine. It was a prank call for a YouTube channel. No hard feelings?

SEND_POLICE.message: Police break into the house only to find two friends laughing at the prank, wasting valuable law enforcement time.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters search for a 'time portal' and find only a fog machine, leading to a formal complaint.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Medics respond to a 'temporal displacement injury' and find no patient, just a staged scene, wasting medical resources.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control is perplexed, noting no animals involved, and the callers are cited for prank calling.

DISMISS.message: The dispatcher recognizes the hoax and terminates the call, preventing unnecessary dispatch and logging the incident.

title: Pirate Ship Besieging My Apartment
description: Caller frantically reports that a full-rigged pirate ship has sailed up their street and is firing cannonballs at their building.
initial_variations: Ahoy! There be pirates! A ship just sailed up my street and they're shooting cannons! Send the coast guard!
My name is {caller_name}. Ye gotta help! A pirate crew boarded me building! Captain {victim_name} has a parrot!
This is not a drill! Pirates! They're yelling 'arrr' and looting the lobby! I need backup!
Help! A jolly roger is flying outside my window! They're swinging on ropes and breaking things!

specific_details: The ship has three masts and a skull flag
They're using grappling hooks to climb the fire escape
One pirate is wearing an eye patch and has a peg leg
They've already stolen the couch and the TV

initial: We're at {address_location}. The ship is right outside, cannonballs are flying!
My place, {address_location}. They've anchored in the street, if you can believe it.
describing_attack: Still {address_location}. They're coming through the windows now!
demanding_navy: I already said {address_location}! Where's the navy? They're plundering my apartment!
hoax_revealed: Alright, we're just at {address_location}. It's a costume party that got out of hand. Sorry.

initial: I can hear {ambient_audio}. Also {specific_details}. It's a real pirate invasion!
describing_attack: Now {ambient_audio} is getting closer. And {specific_details}. They're demanding rum!
demanding_navy: How many details do I need? {specific_details} and the sounds {ambient_audio}. Are you sending help or not?
hoax_revealed: The 'pirates' were actors from a local theater troupe. So, it was all staged.

initial: I'm terrified! This is straight out of a movie!
describing_attack: I'm barricading the door with a desk. {victim_name} is yelling 'walk the plank'!
demanding_navy: I'm getting angry! The coast guard should be here by now! They're taking my stuff!
hoax_revealed: We're all fine, just having a laugh. It was a prank call for a podcast. No real pirates.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive to a 'pirate attack' only to find a themed party, wasting hours on a hoax and angering the community.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters respond with lights blazing, but discover no fire or emergency, just partiers with cardboard swords.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Ambulances are dispatched for 'multiple casualties' but find only a prank, delaying treatment for real patients.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control officer finds a parrot (not even a real one) and leaves disappointed, issuing a warning.

DISMISS.message: The dispatcher wisely dismisses the call as a hoax, saving emergency resources and preventing a wild goose chase.

title: Invisible Home Invasion
description: Caller frantically reports invisible entities moving furniture and drinking milk, later admitting it's a prank.
initial_variations: Help! {caller_name} here. There are invisible aliens in my house! They're throwing my couch around! {ambient_audio}
You've got to send someone! There's an invisible invasion happening right now in my living room. They're drinking all the milk!
Emergency! My furniture is floating and I can't see who's doing it! {caller_name} speaking. Please hurry!
This is {caller_name}. I need the ghostbusters or something. My chairs just flew across the room! {ambient_audio}

specific_details: They only move the IKEA furniture
They drank the organic milk but left the skim

initial: It's at {address_location}. They're everywhere!
{address_location}. Come quick!
adding_absurd_details: Still {address_location}. Now they're in the kitchen!
caller_admits_prank: Okay, fine, I'm at {address_location}. It's just a joke.

initial: {specific_details}. {ambient_audio}
adding_absurd_details: They've started to fold the laundry too! {ambient_audio}
dispatcher_skeptical: I swear, {specific_details}. And now they're humming showtunes.
caller_admits_prank: There are no details, it's a prank.

initial: It's {caller_name}. I'm alone, but they're everywhere!
adding_absurd_details: {caller_name} again. They won't hurt me, they just like IKEA.
dispatcher_skeptical: I'm {caller_name}. You don't believe me, do you?
caller_admits_prank: This is {caller_name}. I was just messing around.

initial: What? No, I'm serious! They're really here!
adding_absurd_details: You think I'm lying? I swear on my collection of vintage spoons!
dispatcher_skeptical: Alright, alright, you caught me. It's a prank, bro.
caller_admits_prank: Yeah, I already admitted it. Sorry.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive and find no evidence of aliens, filing a report for a hoax call.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire department responds and finds no fire, only a prank caller.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: EMTs arrive; caller says it was a joke, wasting valuable resources.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control checks for animals, finds none. Caller laughs.

DISMISS.message: Dispatcher recognizes the prank and ends the call, saving emergency resources.

title: The Giant Pizza Menace
description: Caller insists a gigantic pizza is rolling down the street, destroying everything; it's a hoax.
initial_variations: Oh my god, there's a giant pizza rolling towards my house! It's covered in pepperoni and it's going to crush us! {caller_name} here!
Emergency! A slice of doom! I mean, a whole pizza, giant, it's just rolled over my neighbor's car! {ambient_audio}
{caller_name} calling. You've got to stop the pizzapocalypse! It's heading right for the school!
This is not a joke, there's a gigantic extra-large pizza demolishing the neighborhood! {ambient_audio}

specific_details: It's got olives and jalapeños
It's from Gino's Pizzeria, I recognize the box

initial: We're at {address_location}! It's rolling past now.
escalating_threat: Still {address_location}. It took out a mailbox!

initial: It's {absurd_size} wide! {specific_details}. {ambient_audio}
escalating_threat: It's picking up speed! And it has extra cheese!
dispatcher_questioning: Look, the crust is gluten-free, if that helps.
prank_confession: No details, it's a prank, I made it up.

escalating_threat: {caller_name} again. I'm trying to warn people.
dispatcher_questioning: Yes, {caller_name}. Why won't you believe me?

escalating_threat: You think this is a joke?! My begonias are flattened!
dispatcher_questioning: Okay, okay, you got me. It's a prank.
prank_confession: Yeah, I know, I already said it was a prank.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police find no giant pizza, issue a citation for false reporting.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire trucks respond to a non-existent disaster; caller giggles.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics arrive ready for mass casualties; it's a hoax.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control is bewildered; caller insists the pizza has anchovies.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as obvious prank, saving emergency resources.

title: Gnome Uprising
description: Caller reports that their garden gnomes have come to life and are demanding a union; it's a prank call.
initial_variations: {caller_name} here. My garden gnomes have come to life! They're marching around the yard with little signs. {ambient_audio}
There's a rebellion in my front garden! The gnomes are demanding a union! Send someone!
Help! My ceramic gnomes are alive and they're chanting about unfair labor practices. This is {caller_name}.
The gnomes are on strike! They've got picket signs and everything. {ambient_audio}

specific_details: The leader has a red hat and says 'you shall not mow!'
They're demanding more fertilizer and less sun

initial: We're at {address_location}. They're all over the flowerbeds!
gnome_demands: Still {address_location}. Now they've built a tiny barricade.
skeptical_dispatcher: I said {address_location}. Why aren't you coming?

initial: There are {gnome_count}. {specific_details}. {ambient_audio}
gnome_demands: The red-hat one is reading a list of demands. {ambient_audio}
skeptical_dispatcher: Seriously, {gnome_count} of them, and they have a tiny Davy lamp.
revealed_prank: No details, just a silly joke.

initial: This is {caller_name}. I'm hiding behind the hedge.
gnome_demands: {caller_name} here. They're looking at me funny.
skeptical_dispatcher: {caller_name}. You think I'm crazy, don't you?
revealed_prank: It's {caller_name}. I'm not crazy, just bored.

initial: They're really marching! I'm not making this up!
gnome_demands: You can hear their tiny chanting! I swear!
skeptical_dispatcher: Fine, you got me. It's a prank.
revealed_prank: I admitted it already. Sorry for wasting your time.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive to find a peaceful garden and no gnomes in sight; caller booked for false reporting.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters check for hazardous materials; it's a prank, caller is laughing.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics ready for psychiatric evaluation; caller says it was just a joke.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control looks confused; caller insists gnomes count as wildlife.

DISMISS.message: Dispatcher identifies the absurdity and dismisses the call, preventing a resource waste.

title: The Cat Who Refuses to Stay Dead
description: Caller claims their cat keeps dying and coming back to life in a time loop; it's a prank.
initial_variations: My cat died this morning, but I just found him scratching at the back door again. {caller_name}. This is the third time!
Emergency: my cat is living the same day over and over! He dies at 8 AM and then reappears. {ambient_audio}
{caller_name} here. I think my cat is immortal or stuck in a loop. He's died twice today!
You have to help, my cat is like Schrodinger's cat but real! He's dead and alive simultaneously. {ambient_audio}

specific_details: He's an orange tabby named Marmalade
He brings back a different collar each time

initial: At {address_location}. I buried him in the backyard, but now he's on the couch!
cat_reappears: Still at {address_location}. He just walked through the wall!

initial: He's died {death_count}. {specific_details}. {ambient_audio}
cat_reappears: This time he came back with a bow tie! {ambient_audio}
dispatcher_baffled: I have video! Well, maybe not. But {specific_details}.
confession: No details, I made it up.

initial: {caller_name}. I'm a little freaked out, honestly.
cat_reappears: {caller_name}. I'm starting to get used to it.
confession: {caller_name}. I just wanted to see what you'd do.

initial: I know it sounds crazy, but he's right here, purring!
cat_reappears: I'm not lying! He literally rose from the grave!
dispatcher_baffled: Okay, you caught me. There's no time-loop cat.
confession: I already told you, it's a prank.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive and find one cat, alive and normal; caller is warned.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire department responds; no fire, just a prankster with an undead cat story.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: EMTs assess caller's mental state; caller admits to prank.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control finds a live cat; caller says it was a joke.

DISMISS.message: Dispatcher dismisses the call as a clear hoax.

title: The Count Next Door
description: Caller insists their neighbor is a vampire holding loud organ recitals; it's a prank call.
initial_variations: {caller_name} here. My neighbor is a vampire! I've seen him not reflect in mirrors, and he plays the organ at midnight. {ambient_audio}
There's a bloodsucker living at my apartment complex. He's got a cape and everything! Send a priest or something.
911? My neighbor is definitely a vampire. He only comes out at night and he tried to sell me a timeshare in Transylvania. {caller_name}.
This is {caller_name}. My neighbor just turned into a bat and flew into my window! {ambient_audio}

specific_details: He drives a hearse
His name is Alucard
vampire_behavior: drinks red liquid from a goblet

initial: At {address_location}. He's in the next apartment.
vampire_accusations: Still {address_location}. Now he's hovering outside my window!

initial: {vampire_behavior}. {specific_details}. {ambient_audio}
vampire_accusations: He just bit into a blood orange! The horror!
dispatcher_frustration: Look, {specific_details}. And I found a coffin in his storage unit.

initial: It's {caller_name}. I'm staying inside with garlic.
vampire_accusations: {caller_name}. He's hypnotizing me with his eyes!
admission: {caller_name}. I was just pulling your leg.

vampire_accusations: You have to believe me! He's turning the block into ghouls!
dispatcher_frustration: Alright, it's a prank. There's no vampire.
admission: Yes, I already confessed. No need to send Buffy.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics arrive with holy water; caller says it was a joke.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control checks for bats; caller insists the neighbor is the bat.

DISMISS.message: Dispatcher recognizes the prank and dismisses the call, conserving resources.

title: Invisible Home Invasion
description: A caller reports an invisible assailant, but the details grow increasingly absurd, revealing it as a prank.
initial_variations: Help! There's someone in my house! I can't see them but they're attacking me! My name is {caller_name}!
I'm being attacked by an invisible person! They're throwing things at me! You have to send someone! This is {caller_name}!
Oh my god, it's an invisible intruder! They just pushed me! {caller_name} here, please hurry!
Emergency! An invisible man is in my living room and he's stealing my invisible cookies! This is {caller_name}!

specific_details: I can hear footsteps but no one there.
Furniture moving by itself.
An invisible pie just hit my face.
I feel cold spots everywhere.

describing_invisible: Still at {address_location}. They just threw an invisible lamp at me!
challenged: I'm at {address_location}, I swear! Why don't you believe me?
confession: Okay, okay, I'm actually at {address_location} and there's no one. It was a prank.

initial: They're invisible! {specific_details}. I can't see them but I can feel them!
describing_invisible: Now they're throwing invisible pies! And I think they're laughing. {specific_details}
challenged: Well, maybe they're not invisible, maybe they're just very fast. Or a ghost? {specific_details}
confession: I made it all up. {specific_details} was just me moving stuff.

describing_invisible: I'm trying to fight back, but I can't land a hit. It's like fighting air!

confession: You got me. It was just a joke. I'll stop.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control is baffled by the report of an invisible animal.

title: Time Loop Catastrophe
description: A caller claims to be reliving a car crash repeatedly, but inconsistencies expose the prank.
initial_variations: Help! I'm stuck in a time loop! Every time the clock hits 3:15, my car crashes into a tree! This is {caller_name}! You have to stop it!
This is {caller_name}! I've called you 47 times! I keep reliving the same moment! A car crash, over and over!
Emergency! I'm in a temporal anomaly! I crash my car every five minutes, and it resets! Send someone to break the loop!
It's {caller_name}! I think I'm caught in a time loop! I'm calling from just before I crash! Please, you have to help!

specific_details: The radio always plays 'I Got You Babe'.
A groundhog keeps running across the road.
I see a blue police box flickering.
A man in a rabbit suit waves each time.

initial: I'm at {address_location}. The loop is centered right here!
loop_description: Still at {address_location}. It's about to reset again!
inconsistency: I told you, {address_location}. It just reset again!
reveal: Fine, I'm at {address_location}. There's no loop. Happy?

initial: It's always the same! {specific_details}. Then I crash into that tree!
loop_description: This time I tried to swerve, but {specific_details} happened, and I still crashed!
inconsistency: Well, sometimes it's a mailbox instead of a tree. {specific_details} still happens.
reveal: I looked up 'time loop pranks' online. {specific_details} is from Groundhog Day.

initial: I'm terrified! I keep dying but then I'm back here!
loop_description: I'm dizzy. Each reset makes my head spin.
inconsistency: I'm actually fine. I haven't crashed at all. I just thought it'd be funny.
reveal: I'm okay. It's just a prank, bro.

initial: I've lost count! Maybe 50 times? 60?
loop_description: It's been at least 100 loops now. I'm going insane!
inconsistency: Um, actually, maybe just twice? I'm not sure anymore.
reveal: Zero loops. I just called because I'm bored.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police find no crash, just a prankster.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters waste time on a fake report.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Medics are greeted by laughter and an admission of prank.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control is confused by the request.

DISMISS.message: Dispatcher correctly identifies the call as a time-wasting hoax.

title: Extraterrestrial Pizza Hostage

Aliens abducted my cat and won't give him back unless a pizza is delivered to {caller_name}'s house! Help!
Emergency! Extraterrestrials are demanding pizza or they'll probe me! {caller_name} here, please send pizza!

Their ship looks like a giant pizza box.
They zapped my mailbox into a pepperoni.
They're arguing about pineapple on pizza.

negotiation: {address_location}. I tried to negotiate with breadsticks, but no luck.
prank_revealed: Okay, {address_location}. But there are no aliens, just my buddies.

initial: They're about four feet tall, green, and hungry. {specific_details}
alien_demands: Now they want garlic knots too! {specific_details}
negotiation: I told them about delivery times, but they threatened to dematerialize me. {specific_details}
prank_revealed: The 'aliens' are my roommates in costumes. I just wanted free pizza.

initial: I'm scared! They keep scanning me with a weird device.
alien_demands: I'm trying to keep them calm. They like dad jokes.
negotiation: Actually, I'm starting to think they're not real aliens. This feels like a prank.
prank_revealed: I'm fine. It was a prank for TikTok.

initial: They want pepperoni, extra cheese, and no anchovies!
alien_demands: Large pepperoni, and they're asking if you have gluten-free crust?
negotiation: Honestly, I just want a free pizza. Can you deliver one anyway?
prank_revealed: Any pizza is fine, now that I'm busted.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police find a group of friends laughing and no aliens.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters are told it was just a prank.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: EMTs are greeted by a staged alien scene.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control is asked if they handle 'space critters'.

DISMISS.message: The hoax call is correctly dismissed.

title: Toaster Rebellion
description: A caller reports sentient kitchen appliances leading a rebellion, an obvious prank.
initial_variations: My toaster is talking! It says it's the leader of the appliance rebellion and it's going to burn the house down! This is {caller_name}, please help!
The blender and the toaster are forming an alliance! They've taken over the kitchen! {caller_name} here, send someone!
Emergency! My microwave is threatening to nuke the neighborhood! It's a full appliance uprising! I'm {caller_name}!
Help! My fridge just demanded a ransom of fresh bagels! All my appliances are sentient! This is {caller_name}!

specific_details: The toaster speaks in a British accent.
They're demanding fresh bagels and coffee.
My fridge is humming 'We Will Rock You'.
The oven has a French accent and is very rude.

initial: I'm at {address_location}. The kitchen is their fortress!
appliance_mutiny: {address_location}. The toaster just took my phone charger hostage!
contradictions: Still {address_location}. Though now they're just making toast.
prank_end: {address_location}. There is no rebellion, I just like pranks.

initial: {specific_details}. It's terrifying!
contradictions: Well, the toaster only talks when I'm alone. Maybe I imagined it? But {specific_details}!
prank_end: I put a speaker in the toaster. {specific_details} was me doing a voice.

initial: I'm hiding in the living room. They control the kitchen!
appliance_mutiny: I'm trying to reason with them, but the coffee maker is too bitter.
contradictions: I'm not hurt. They've calmed down. The toaster says it was just a glitch.
prank_end: I'm fine. It was all a joke for a YouTube video.

initial: The toaster is the mastermind!
appliance_mutiny: Toaster, with the blender as its enforcer.
contradictions: Actually, my toaster is from Walmart, maybe I should return it. It's not that smart.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police find a prankster and no hostile appliances.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters are unimpressed by the fake appliance uprising.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Medics are shown a talking toaster prop.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control is asked about robot animals.

title: The Vampire Next Door
description: Caller insists their neighbor is a vampire, but description is full of clichés, indicating a prank.
initial_variations: My neighbor is a vampire! He bit my dog and now the dog sparkles! I'm {caller_name}, and he's coming for me next!
{caller_name} here! The guy next door only comes out at night, and I found a coffin in his garage! He's a vampire!
Help! A vampire is stalking me! He has fangs and everything! This is {caller_name}! Send a priest, or Buffy!
Emergency! My neighbor is a creature of the night! I saw him turn into a bat! {caller_name} needs help!

specific_details: He drinks tomato juice like blood.
He sparkles in the sun, like a disco ball.
He turns into a bat, but it's just a flying squirrel.
He sleeps in a coffin, but I peeked and it's full of pillows.

initial: I'm at {address_location}. He lives right next door!
vampire_details: {address_location}. I just saw him levitating in his yard!
skepticism: At {address_location}. I know it sounds crazy, but it's true!
admission: Okay, {address_location}. It was a dare from my friends.

initial: {specific_details}. He never eats garlic!
vampire_details: He invited me to dinner and the menu was all rare steak. {specific_details}
skepticism: Well, he doesn't actually sparkle, but he's really pale. And {specific_details}.
admission: I got the idea from a movie. {specific_details} was just made up.

initial: I'm barricading my door with garlic and crosses!
vampire_details: I'm hiding in my basement. I think he can hear my heartbeat.
skepticism: I'm okay. He just waved at me. He seems nice, actually.
admission: I'm fine. My neighbor Bob is not a vampire, just a night owl.

initial: He says his name is Vlad. Very original.
vampire_details: Vlad, or maybe Edward? He changes it.
skepticism: His real name is Bob. But he goes by 'The Dark One'.
admission: His name is Bob. I just called him a vampire for fun.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police find a prank and a very confused neighbor.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters are told it's a vampire hoax.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Medics find no puncture wounds, just a prank.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control is asked if they handle 'werewolves' too.

DISMISS.message: The ridiculous claim is correctly identified as a prank.
